creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
I second this suggestion.

Having all build failure logs easily downloadable and in a centralized location would be extremely helpful for tools like https://portsfallout.com/ and https://github.com/dmgk/fallout. As an example, the Go project uses fetchlogs[1]/greplogs[2] utilities that allow downloading Go build failure logs from the Go dashboard[3] and searching them from the local file system.

[1] https://pkg.go.dev/golang.org/x/build@v0.0.0-20220713202351-876116a7e6db/cmd/fetchlogs
[2] https://pkg.go.dev/golang.org/x/build@v0.0.0-20220713202351-876116a7e6db/cmd/greplogs
[3] https://build.golang.org/
